cases.expected_message: 37/64 acquisition yield is confused with conditional 37/62
decimal differs beyond the registered tolerance

cases.source:
import math

def accepts(actual, n):
    expected = 1.0 - math.pow(0.05, 1.0 / n)
    return actual == expected
